arts.ttl: Five epic Barca-Bayern Champions League matches
arts.sum: Barcelona and Bayern Munich will meet each other for the 11th time in Champions League history when they face off on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: How might FC Barcelona lineup for Champions League clash against Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: Flick will go all out to try to beat Bayern and make a statement on the big Champions League stage with the Bundesliga side employing a very similar style of football to the Blaugrana with high pressure and intensity throughout the 90 minutes in what should be a spectacular meeting. A big night is in store at the Lluís Companys in the Catalan capital as Hansi Flick’s Barcelona host Bayern Munich in matchday three of the 2024-25 UEFA Champions League phase (kick-off 3pm ET) in a match that will gauge Barça’s aspirations in the top European competition against one of the favourites.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Bayern Munich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The standout fixture of Matchday 3 in the 2024/25 Champions League league phase arrives in Catalonia on Wednesday night as Barcelona host Bayern Munich. Here is 90min's guide to Barcelona vs Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Manchester United make contact with ex-Barcelona manager about replacing Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Xavi Hernandez did not leave the club in the most ideal fashion, sacked just weeks after the club had given him a public show of confidence, and he stepped back from his resignation. He did break a three-year La Liga drought with Barcelona though, and he has said he felt that his work […] The post Manchester United make contact with ex-Barcelona manager about replacing Erik ten Hag appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Why Kompany managing Bayern is 'not a risk'
arts.sum: Nedum Onuoha discusses how his former Manchester City team-mate Vincent Kompany will lead Bayern Munich in this season's Champions League.

arts.ttl: How to watch Barcelona vs Bayern Munich: TV channel and live stream for Champions League today
arts.sum: Barcelona must improve on woeful recent record against Bayern

arts.ttl: Man United chiefs have been in Barcelona for talks over Erik ten Hag replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly held talks with former Barcelona manager Xavi, with intermediaries twice contacting the Spanish tactician over potentially replacing Erik ten Hag as Red Devils boss. Man Utd chiefs have been in Barcelona recently for what they claim have been other business matters, but it seems there’s also been contact with Xavi about […] The post Man United chiefs have been in Barcelona for talks over Erik ten Hag replacement appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: How Hansi Flick has revitalised Barcelona ahead of Bayern Munich reunion and El Clasico
arts.sum: Barcelona have been Europe's in-form team at the start of the 2024-25 season but Hansi Flick's side face an acid test of a week which will see them play both Bayern Munich and Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Champions League predictions including Barcelona vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Champions League fixtures, including Barcelona vs. Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich, Joshua Kimmich heading toward a new deal?; Bayern eyeing Manchester United’s Marcus Rashford?; FC Barcelona to target Liverpool’s Darwin Nunez if it misses on Man City’s Erling Haaland; and MORE!
arts.sum: After rumors linking him to Paris Saint-Germain, Manchester City, Liverpool FC, Arsenal FC, Real Madrid, and FC Barcelona have been swirling for months, it appears that Joshua Kimmich and Bayern Munich could be lining up for a contract extension, which should satisfy both parties. Could Bayern Munich be thinking about a pursuit of Manchester United attacker Marcus Rashford?
